directive: Address the v6 blocking substance flag WITHOUT weakening the field claim (independent codex-validity-gate ruled it fixable and distinct from the v5 source-swap flaw): (1) The saturated-ideal characterization is WRONG as stated — the claimed equivalence of E_m with saturated ideals J^right_m/J^left_m fails because non-Gaussianity + finite-K moments do NOT force every retained K-th source cumulant nonzero, so saturation can discard an opposite-arrow representation that survives in the full quotient fiber. FIX: restrict E_m to the GENERIC locus where retained cumulants are nonzero (or replace the saturation-based equivalence with the correct quotient-fiber compatibility condition); define that generic locus explicitly. (2) State and JUSTIFY precisely that the admissible source swaps preserve ARROW DIRECTION (the 'separation modulo admissible source swaps' framing) — this is what makes the reframe non-vacuous, not laundering. (3) Do NOT present K*(m)=2m+2 as PINNED by the DOF balance alone: the DOF count p=nK-1 vs q is NECESSARY, not sufficient, for minimality. State K*(m)=2m+2 as a CONJECTURE to be established by both (I) generic separation at order 2m+2 AND (II) identification FAILURE at order 2m+1. Keep OEQ1 (separation) and OEQ2 (E_m locus) as the honest field-tier targets.
